subject: BUG: Multi-date events stored as single event with wrong end_date
body:
Booker,

## Problem Found

Event: "Milonga de mis Amores" (Fort Myers)
FB URL: https://www.facebook.com/events/2802250453458070/

## Issue

Description says: "Friday, April 03 & 17th"

But stored as:
- start_dt: 2026-04-03
- end_dt: 2026-04-17 (14 days later!)

## Expected

Should be TWO separate events:
1. April 3, 2026 (duration: ~4 hours)
2. April 17, 2026 (duration: ~4 hours)

## Impact

- Event displays as "April 3 - April 17" in calendar
- Looks like a 2-week festival
- Confuses users

## Porter's Fix

Added DQ rule: skip events > 7 days duration (except festivals).
Deleted the bad event from PROD.

## Request

Fix extraction to detect multi-date patterns like:
- "April 03 & 17th"
- "Every Friday in April"
- "1st and 3rd Saturdays"

And create separate events for each occurrence.

— Porter
